title: Agent Alpha Signal Extractor
body: Extract alpha signals from whale wallets and smart-money flows for AI trading agents.

title: Agent Counterparty Verification
body: Verify counterparty wallets before agent-initiated transactions using risk signals.

title: Agent Cross-Chain Coordinator
body: Coordinate AI agent actions across multiple chains with unified state awareness.

title: Agent Data Budget Manager
body: Track and optimise GoldRush API credit consumption across AI agent workflows.

title: Agent Discovery Protocol
body: Discover and verify registered AI agents onchain via their wallet signatures and activity.

title: Agent Fleet Monitor
body: Monitor a fleet of AI agent wallets for health, balances, and activity in one view.

title: Agent Market Surveillance
body: Continuous market surveillance for AI agents — price anomalies, volume spikes, and wash trading.

title: Agent Onchain News Aggregator
body: Aggregate significant onchain events as structured news for AI agent context.

title: Agent Payment Optimizer
body: Optimise agent payment routing by comparing gas, fees, and settlement times across chains.

title: Agent Reputation Builder
body: Build and verify onchain reputation scores for AI agents based on transaction history.

title: Agent Risk Circuit Breaker
body: Automatically pause agent transactions when onchain risk thresholds are breached.

title: Agent Wallet Skill
body: Give AI agents the ability to read wallet state, balances, and transaction data.

title: Agent Yield Harvester
body: AI agent that monitors yield opportunities and auto-harvests rewards across DeFi protocols.

title: Autonomous DeFi Agent
body: Autonomous agent that reads and reacts to DeFi state changes via GoldRush webhooks.

title: Claude GoldRush Skill
body: Claude agent skill for querying GoldRush APIs — fetch wallet data, prices, and NFTs.

title: GoldRush MCP Server
body: Model Context Protocol server exposing GoldRush APIs to LLMs and AI agents.

title: Onchain Memory Store
body: Persistent onchain memory layer for AI agents backed by wallet and contract state.

title: Onchain Research Agent
body: AI agent for deep onchain research — traces wallets, maps protocols, and surfaces insights.

title: Real-time Wallet Stream
body: Subscribe to live wallet activity events via WebSocket — zero polling, instant updates.
